info.name: Markeye AI Agent (Mark)
info.description: Collection for managing and testing the Markeye AI backend.

request.description: Returns a simple list of all active leads, their names, and phone numbers. Use this to find the exact phone number needed for the Reset Session endpoint.
Returns BANT score, current state, and recent conversation history for a lead. Essential for live monitoring!
Clears the WAITING/CLOSED state and history for a specific phone number. Mark will treat them as a new customer.
Triggers a proactive message from Mark to a new lead. Perfect for warm outreach.
Simulates an inbound message from WhatsApp Cloud API.

body.raw:
{
    "first_name": "Nihal",
    "last_name": "Test",
    "phone": "+918160178327",
    "email": "nihal@example.com",
    "company": "Markeye Agency",
    "industry": "Real Estate",
    "form_message": "I am looking for an AI solution for my property business."
}

request.description: Simulates a lead filling out the form on your website.
